name: Whole Wheat Burger Buns
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the baking yeast and 1 tablespoon of molasses to the warm water. Stir well and let sit until bubbly.
2. In a large bowl, mix together the soymilk, 1/2 cup of molasses, melted margarine, and salt. Gradually add the yeast mixture.
3. Slowly incorporate flour (combine equal parts white and whole wheat flour) into the dough, one cup at a time, stirring well after each addition.
4. Knead the dough on a floured surface for about 5 minutes or until smooth and elastic. Add more flour as needed.
5. Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover with plastic wrap, and let rise in a warm place for about one hour.
6. Punch down the dough and shape it into buns. Place them on greased cookie sheets and cover with plastic wrap sprayed with non-stick spray. Let rise an additional 30 to 40 minutes.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 minutes. Cool on wire racks.
Note: Alternatively, form the dough into two large loaves and bake for 30 to 35 minutes. Brush tops with melted margarine or spray with PAM while bread is hot, if desired.
